title: C@na'ah #5570
definition:
Senaah or Hassenaah [with the article] = "thorny"

 1) ancestor of a family who returned from exile with Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Senaah or Hassenaah [with the article] = "thorny"

 1) ancestor of a family who returned from exile with Zerubbabel

    NASB:  a family of returning exiles
